items.title: GCC growth lifts Awfis earnings; A Rs 2,000 Cr AI & deeptech fund
items.summary: Profit after tax for Awfis rose 66% year-on-year to Rs 71 crore, while operating EBITDA climbed 37% to Rs 550 crore, with margins expanding to 36.8%.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
items.summary: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.

items.title: Did the Pope use AI to write about the dangers of AI?
